data.title: ThreatLocker Highlights Key Cyber Threat Activity and Research from April 2026
data.description: In Orlando, Florida on May 1, 2026, ThreatLocker revealed summaries of their findings, cybersecurity trends, and efforts within the community. The report focuses on emerging threats, advancements in cybersecurity, and engagement with the public. Notably, the company emphasized the importance of staying vigilant in the face of the evolving threat landscape.

data.title: Yangarra Announces Voting Results from the Annual Meeting
data.description: Yangarra Resources Ltd. (TSX:YGR) has revealed the outcome of its Annual Meeting of shareholders.

data.title: Emerald Announces Date for First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Emerald Holding, Inc. (NYSE: EEX) declared plans to disclose its Q1 2026 financial results before the market opens on Monday, May 11, 2026. A conference call to review the outcomes is set for 8:30 am ET on the same day. Those interested can access the call through dialing 1-800-715-9871 (domestic) or 1-646-307-1963 (international). A replay will also be available from 11:30 am ET onwards.

data.title: General Catalyst Global Resilience Merger Corp. Announces Closing of $402.5 Million Initial Public Offering
data.description: Boston, Massachusetts-based General Catalyst Global Resilience Merger Corp. successfully completed its initial public offering on May 01, 2026, issuing a total of 40,250,000 Global Resilience Aligned Initial Listing securities (“GRAIL securities”) priced at $10.00 per security. This included 5,250,000 GRAIL securities from the exercise of the underwriters’ over-allotment option. Trading for the GRAIL securities began on the Nasdaq Global Market under the symbol “GCGRU” on April 30, 2026. Each GRAIL security comprises one Class A ordinary share of the company and one-fourth of a redeemable warrant. Upon the commencement of separate trading, the Class A ordinary shares and warrants are anticipated to be listed on the Nasdaq Global Market under the symbols “GCGR” and “GCGRW,” respectively.

data.title: Why Is Newell Brands Stock Gaining Friday?
data.description: Shares of Newell Brands Inc. (NASDAQ: NWL) saw a significant increase on Friday following the release of their first-quarter financial results. Despite ongoing weak demand, the consumer products company managed to report a smaller loss than expected and showed improvements in margins. Their adjusted loss per share was 5 cents, surpassing analysts' predictions of a 9-cent loss. Although revenue decreased by 1.1% year over year to $1.549 billion, it exceeded the estimated $1.507 billion. Core sales were down by 3.5%. Within the segments, the Home & Commercial Solutions unit recorded net sales of $780 million, experiencing a core sales drop of 6.9%. Meanwhile, the Learning & Development segment achieved $594 million in net sales. The company attributed its resilience in a challenging sales environment to effective pricing strategies and a robust product portfolio. For further details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Pentagon inks AI agreements with Google, OpenAI, Nvidia, Microsoft, Amazon, and SpaceX, allowing their tech on classified military networks.
data.description: Agreements have been made by the Department of Defense to allow artificial intelligence technology from notable companies such as Google and OpenAI to operate on highly confidential military networks.

data.title: Sun Life U.S. receives Top Workplaces award from USA Today for sixth consecutive year
data.description: In Wellesley, Massachusetts on May 1, 2026, Sun Life U.S. achieved recognition as one of USA Today's Top Workplaces for 2026, marking the sixth consecutive year the company has received this honor. The award was granted based on employee surveys conducted by Energage, along with an evaluation of Sun Life's benefits package and overall workplace environment.

data.title: Bitcoin Sells Off Under New Fed Chairs: Will History Repeat Itself Under Kevin Warsh?
data.description: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) has historically experienced sell-offs during transitions of Fed chairs, with the upcoming transition to Kevin Warsh on May 15 happening amidst a starting rate of 3.50% and a projected single rate cut for 2026. This trend has been consistent in the past - when Janet Yellen took over, Bitcoin dropped by 86%, during Powell's appointment it shed 73.56%, and during Powell's second term confirmation in 2022, it fell by 60.72%. Powell recently concluded his final FOMC meeting as Fed Chairman. With Warsh now facing the scenario of 3.50% rates and only one expected rate cut for the year, this could pose challenges for risk assets. Presently, Bitcoin is trading at approximately $77,367.

data.title: Sportradar Group AG (SRAD) Faces Investor Scrutiny Amid Muddy Waters, Callisto Accusations of Illegal Business Model; Shares Fall 22% - Hagens Berman
data.description: On May 1, 2026, in San Francisco, the price of shares in Sportradar Group AG (NASDAQ: SRAD) plunged by 22% on April 22, 2026. This drop was initiated by reports from Muddy Waters Research and Callisto Research, alleging that the company had provided false information.

data.description: The budget airline, which has faced challenges for a long time, was attempting to obtain a financial support of $500 million from the Trump administration.

data.title: BMI Investigation: Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP Encourages Badger Meter, Inc. (NYSE: BMI) Investors to Contact the Firm
data.description: Investigating potential violations of federal securities laws, Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP, a renowned securities litigation law firm, is looking into Badger Meter, Inc. (NYSE: BMI) on behalf of investors. The investigation is focused on determining if Badger Meter breached federal securities laws. Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP, a nationally recognized firm, is known for handling high-profile securities litigation cases and ensuring justice for investors.

data.title: The Brock Group Expands Southeast Footprint with Strategic Acquisition of Florida-Based Scaffolding Business
data.description: On May 1, 2026, in Houston, The Brock Group, a top provider of specialty industrial services, revealed the purchase of a prominent scaffolding company with five branches in significant urban areas in Florida. These locations include Fort Myers, Orlando, Pompano Beach.

data.title: College Decision Day Is Here: What Students and Families Should Know About Paying for College
data.description: In Newark, Delaware, high school seniors nationwide are marking College Decision Day by finalizing their choice of college for the upcoming fall semester. Apart from considering the academic aspects, families are particularly focused on the financial implications and future prospects of this decision. Affordability is a crucial deciding factor for many, with costs playing a key role in college selection. However, the decision also encompasses aspects like overall fit and potential outcomes post-graduation. This process is not solely about choosing where to study but also about assessing the broader implications for long-term success.

data.title: Los Angeles Mayor Tours ECHELON Studios Hollywood Site, Advancing Shared Vision for Keeping Hollywood in Hollywood
data.description: In Los Angeles on May 1, 2026, ECHELON Studios Hollywood Founder David Simon hosted Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass for an exclusive preview and tour of the city's latest purpose-built studio and creative complex. The event highlighted their joint dedication to maintaining the city's entertainment industry.

data.title: Dominion Energy Sees 'Durable' Data Center Demand
data.description: Dominion Energy Inc. (NYSE: D) released its first-quarter 2026 financial results, with GAAP earnings at 69 cents per share, a decrease from the previous year's 77 cents. In contrast, operating earnings improved to 95 cents per share, surpassing the estimated 91 cents. Variances between GAAP and operating earnings were influenced by mark-to-market impacts and a $194 million net market loss, in addition to a $78 million solar impairment charge, a $120 million weather impact, and a $58 million offshore wind-related benefit. Revenue saw a significant growth of about 23% to $5.019 billion from $4.076 billion, exceeding the $4.512 billion estimates. Net income declined to $621 million from $665 million, while operating earnings increased to $847 million from $803 million. Income from operations rose to $1.392 billion. Furthermore, Dominion Energy Virginia was highlighted for its segment performance.

data.title: The Inner Circle acknowledges Dr. Andrew Wondra as a 2026 Pinnacle Lifetime Member
data.description: In Boynton Beach, Florida, as of May 1, 2026, Dr. Andrew Wondra has gained recognition as a distinguished 2026 Pinnacle Lifetime Member in The Inner Circle for his work in personalized patient-focused care in the field of interventional pain medicine. Dr. Wondra's dedication and expertise have been highlighted in this prestigious achievement.
